headline: Starbucks Nashville Office Reshapes Supply Chain And Turnaround Expectations
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) is opening a new corporate office in Nashville to anchor its North American supply chain operations. The move is part of the company’s broader "Back to Starbucks" turnaround plan focused on operational efficiency and cost savings. The Nashville office involves relocating certain roles from Seattle and creating new jobs in Tennessee. For you as an investor, this Nashville office is essentially a bet by Starbucks on tighter control over how its products move from...
